# Zweet Inzanity – Under-Rated Strain in Danger of Extinction
Published Jan 03, 2026 
by Nebula Haze
[Zweet Inzanity](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/zweet-inzanity-rbx-f/ref/63951/) is one of those strains that has somehow flown under the radar and is in **danger of extinction**!
[Zweet Inzanity](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/zweet-inzanity-rbx-f/ref/63951/) is beautiful and easy to grow, with unique bud structure
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/zweet-inzanity-unique-bud-structure-huge-yields-sparkly.jpg)
But the real reason it needs to be saved are its unique, **relaxing-but-not-sleepy** effects.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/zweet-inzanity-bud-grown-under-hlg-300-led-grow-light-sm.jpg)
##  Why Get Zweet Inzanity Seeds?
Make sure to [get Zweet Inzanity seeds](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/zweet-inzanity-rbx-f/ref/63951/) before they’re gone forever. News in the pipeline says this strain is going to be retired soon. Which is an absolute shame and I’ll tell you why.
I’ve grown Zweet Insanity by Ethos Genetics multiple times over the years, from multiple different seed packs. Every single plant has been a favorite.
  * Captivating effects
  * Huge yields (always the best yielder in the tent)
  * Easy to grow and not too fussy.
  * Branchy in a way that makes it easy to train
  * Medium to tall, gives you your money’s worth
  * Buds grow in a kind of round “baseball” or top-heavy shape, that ends up producing massive yields.
  * Mold-resistant and light-stress resistant
  * Consistently ready to harvest with full yields/potency by 70 days after 12/12, sometimes earlier.

## Description of Zweet Inzanity
A visually stunning strain that shines indoors with dense, fat, top-heavy buds. Our deliciously stinky buds lab tested between 2-3% terpenes by weight, with Terpinolene & Pinene as top terpenes. For potency, buds consistently clustered around 21-22% THC. Essentially no CBD but a relaxing 1% CBG-A.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/zweet-inzanity-ethos-cannabis-strain-big-yields-sparkly.jpg)
## Grower Notes on Zweet Inzanity
I love this strain. I have grown it multiple times over the years and every plant produced big, sparkly, tight buds. Medium-tall forgiving plants, easy to train, branchy with lots of bud sites. Buds have lovely bright effects (both energizing and still feel POTENT). Awesome daytime smoke. Perfect for a social session with friends or family. Won’t put you to sleep.
~Nebula Haze
P.S. I’m still in in the process of digging up more photos, especially from when it was growing, but here are some of the pictures I found lying around quickly
Day 30 after 12/12 (already a good size)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/day-30-flowering-zweet-inzanity-led-grow-light.jpg)
Buds and nugs from different grows with Zweet Inzanity
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/zweet-inzanity-ethos-cannabis-strain-bud-big-yields-sparkly.jpg)
It grows top heavy, in a good way
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/zweet-inzanity-cannabis-bud-grown-under-hlg-led-grow-light.jpg)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/zweet-inzanity-spider-farmer-trichome-cola.jpg)
This Zweet Inzanity went through light stress and barely noticed.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/zweet-inzanity-trichome-cola-mars-hydro-led.jpg)
Makes good sized sticky buds that break apart perfectly in your hands.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/zweet-inzanity-bud-closeup-hlg-300-led-grown-sm.jpg)
Since each bud is fat, total weight adds up quickly.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/zweet-inzanity-hlg-300-led-grown-sm-1.jpg)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/zweet-inzanity-bud-hlg-300-led-grown-sm.jpg)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/zweet-inzanity-bud-grown-under-hlg-300-led-grow-light-sm.jpg)
